$comment: Next.js 14 statically exported. The framework may inject a hidden `<next-route-announcer>` that uses the visually-hidden `margin: -1px` trick; spacing rules ignore that framework infrastructure because it is nondeterministic and unactionable. The `wait_for` block points at a `data-plumb-ready` sentinel server-rendered onto `<html>` in `app/layout.tsx`, which makes the app-owned DOM byte-stable across Linux/macOS/Windows runs.
